title: Trilegal makes 6 Partners, taking the total tally to 157
description: Trilegal has announced the elevation of six Counsel to the Equity Partnership, further strengthening the firm’s leadership across key practice areas.The newly appointed Partners are: Abhishek Kumar | Dispute Resolution | New DelhiArnav Nagalia | Real Estate | BengaluruMaitreya Rajurkar | Capital Markets | MumbaiShashwat Sharma | General Corporate | GurugramShreya Kundu | White-Collar Crime | BengaluruThomas J. Vallianeth | TMT | BengaluruThese additions enhance Trilegal’s capabilities acros
